title: Wadi Shab: Swimming Into a Cave
body:
The hike in is deceptively easy — flat, shaded, following a crystal stream. Then the gorge narrows and suddenly you're swimming. The water is shockingly cold even in October.

The payoff is a hidden cave behind a waterfall, accessible only by swimming through a narrow tunnel. Inside, shafts of light pierce the darkness. I stayed for an hour.
